old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-dbsd","title":"Add debug logging to time advancement logic","description":"Modify maybe_advance_time method in python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py to add debug logging with: sim_id, from_us, to_us, queue_size, pending_rx_timeouts, connected_nodes, waiting_nodes when time advances in BARRIER_SYNC mode.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T03:22:40.5308Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T03:22:40.530847Z"}
